eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Genesee; Lapeer; Livingston; Lenawee; Oakland; St. Clair; Washtenaw; Wayne; Monroe; Saginaw, MI; at 2:28 PM on APR 13, 2019 Effective until 3:28 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
